prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDKIT7PC-2022-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Gold Panning Kit Prospecting Tools Classifier Pans Snifter Vials 7pc Description: The ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems. Inside the kit, you'll find a sifting classifier, 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans, a snifter bottle, 2 glass collection vials, and a magnifying tweezer.

The classifier included has a mesh size of 1/2", making it a great size for sifting coarser materials. It has a wire thickness of 1.4mm and is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5-gallon bucket.

Each kit comes with 2 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 2 sizes: 14" diameter and 10" diameter. The pans both fit neatly inside of the sifter, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand.

The last 4 accessories included in this kit are the glass collection vials, the magnifying tweezer, and the snifter bottle, all of which will assist you in picking up, inspecting, and storing your findings. The tweezer features a 4X magnification power and the 4oz snifter bottle can be used to pick up gold flakes.

This complete gold panning kit is a great gift idea for all types of prospectors, whether they are just starting out or are expert gold panners. Teaching children how to prospect is also a wonderful way to spend quality time outdoors while learning a new skill. Make sure to grab this set for yourself or a friend who loves gold panning - it just might pay off. Search Terms: gold prospecting kit tools panning supplies equipment pans for beginners mining recovery rock hounding gem stones sieve sifter set intermediate riffle riffled mesh pickup collector rush sluice nugget precious metal essentials river stream alluvial Features: - GOLD PANNING ESSENTIAL TOOLS - The ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Gold Prospecting kit comes with everything you'll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems! Inside the kit you'll find a sifting classifier, 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans, a snifter bottle, 2 glass collection vials and a magnifying tweezer - 1/2" CLASSIFYING SIFTER SCREEN - The classifier included has a mesh size of 1/2", making it a great size for sifting coarser materials. It has a wire thickness of 1.4mm, and is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5 gallon bucket - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS - Each kit comes with 2 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 2 sizes: 14" diameter and 10" diameter. The pans both fit neatly inside of the sifter, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand - COLLECTION TOOLS - The last 4 accessories included in this kit are the glass collection vials, the magnifying tweezer and the snifter bottle, all which will assist you in picking up, inspecting and storing your findings. The tweezer features a 4X magnification power and the 4oz snifter bottle can be used to pick up gold flakes - SPECIFICATIONS - 7 piece kit; Materials: glass, plastic, steel; Colors: assorted; Items included: 1 classifier, 2 gold pans, 2 glass vials, 1 magnifying tweezer, 1 snifter bottle (4 fluid ounce volume) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-pc Gold Panning Kit Prospecting Tools

anthropic.title_differentiation: Classifier, 2 Dual Riffle Pans, Snifter Bottle, 2 Glass Vials, Magnifying Tweezer, Complete Prospecting Set

openai.title_differentiation: Half Inch Mesh Classifier, 2 Dual Riffle Pans, 4X Magnifier Tweezers, Snifter Bottle, 2 Glass Vials
